div.div:
Closed (通常)
全リクエスト通過
失敗をカウンタに記録

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 490px; margin-left: 1181px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Open (遮断)
全リクエスト即時失敗
(503 / Unavailable)
下流への負荷停止

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 490px; margin-left: 661px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
HalfOpen (試行)
少数リクエストのみ通過
下流の回復を探る

div.div:
直近 1 分で失敗 10 回以上
かつ失敗率 50% 以上

Open 遷移から 30 秒経過
(Kubernetes Pod 再起動
+ Readiness 典型値)

div.div:
HalfOpen 中の試行 3 回
すべて成功

HalfOpen 中の試行で
1 回でも失敗

fill: light-dark(rgb(102, 178, 102), rgb(56, 121, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(102, 178, 102), rgb(56, 121, 56));
fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 778px; margin-left: 92px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
閾値の根拠
・失敗 10 回 / 1 分: 単発失敗では Open にせず、継続失敗で判断
・失敗率 50%: 半分以上失敗 = 下流が明確に不健全 (Hystrix / Resilience4j と同値)
・Open 30 秒: Kubernetes Pod 再起動 + Readiness Probe 登録の典型値
・HalfOpen 3 回: 回復確認に必要な最小サンプル数

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 428px; height: 1px; padding-top: 773px; margin-left: 1092px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
実装ライブラリ
・Go (Dapr ファサード): sony/gobreaker
・Rust (自作領域): failsafe 互換パターン自前実装
両者とも同一状態機械を共有し、メトリクス名を一致
